.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Update the Java version configured in the CI environment from 17 to 21 to match the target JDK.
.github/workflows/publish.yml.why_exists: The project has been upgraded to Java 21; building with JDK 17 may fail if Java 21-specific features or dependencies are used, or simply fails to reflect the target runtime.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the base Docker image from Eclipse Temurin 17 to Amazon Corretto 21 to align with the Java 21 migration.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application is compiled for Java 21 and will fail to start at runtime if executed on a Java 17 runtime environment due to class version incompatibility.
